raw_input: noticed his head slightly tilting to the right, mentioned to doctor
---

Noticed his head tilting slightly to the right when he's in the bouncer. Not
dramatic but consistent. Mentioned it to the pediatrician and she said it could
be mild torticollis from positioning in the womb. We're doing some gentle
stretches a few times a day. She's not worried yet but wants to reassess at
the two-month visit.
